user_request: Quote an NGFW solution for a regional branch office with around 75 concurrent users. The client's IT team specifically asked whether SonicWall has any options in the mid-range tier — they've used SonicWall before and want to see it as one of the options if possible. Include two other vendors as alternatives across the remaining tiers. Lead time is not a concern for this engagement.

budget.summary: Check Point V009-SEC-0002 is the lowest-cost fully clean candidate for the branch-NGFW class, with no rules fired and the strongest margin of the three tiers. It provides 1-5Gbps App-ID throughput appropriate for a 75-user branch and represents a recognized enterprise security vendor distinct from the SonicWall and Palo Alto selections.
bullets: SKU V009-SEC-0002 / VEN-009 Check Point Software; unit cost $666.22
Lead time 21d — at the rule-001 threshold, not exceeded; no substitution required; lead time noted per normal procedure and is not a concern for this engagement (rule-001)
Margin 27.3% — highest of all three tiers, well above the 15% floor (rule-004)
No rule-002 (freshness), rule-003 (availability), or rule-005 (pricing data) conditions fired; catalog data current as of 2026-04-26
Trade-off vs. balanced: $5,904 lower unit cost; branch-tier 1-5Gbps throughput versus SonicWall's enterprise-edge 6-15Gbps profile — appropriate for 75 users but with less headroom for growth

balanced.summary: SonicWall V012-SEC-0001 is placed in the balanced tier per explicit SE and client preference; it is the only SonicWall NGFW SKU in the catalog and carries an enterprise-edge 6-15Gbps throughput profile well-suited to a 75-user regional branch. The critical caveat is a severe data staleness warning (341 days): pricing and availability should be reconfirmed with SonicWall before this option is presented to the client.
bullets: SKU V012-SEC-0001 / VEN-012 SonicWall; unit cost $6,570.84
Lead time 21d — at the rule-001 threshold, not exceeded; lead time noted per normal procedure and is not a concern for this engagement (rule-001)

STALE DATA WARNING: VEN-012 effective_date is 2025-06-05, 341 days ago — far exceeds the 60-day threshold (rule-002); requires_human_review set to true; SE must confirm current pricing and availability with SonicWall before customer delivery
No rule-003 (availability) or rule-005 (pricing data) conditions fired; SKU shows as available in current catalog record, but staleness means this cannot be relied upon without verification

premium.summary: Palo Alto Networks V007-SEC-0002 is the top-performing NGFW in the filtered candidates: enterprise-edge class with 6-15Gbps throughput and SD-WAN capability, no rules fired, and the fastest lead time of the three tiers at 14 days. It provides the strongest performance headroom and represents the industry-recognized premium NGFW vendor, distinct from both Check Point (budget) and SonicWall (balanced).
bullets: SKU V007-SEC-0002 / VEN-007 Palo Alto Networks; unit cost $11,156.91
Lead time 14d — within the 21d rule-001 threshold; no breach; fastest lead time of the three tiers (rule-001)
No rule-002 (freshness), rule-003 (availability), or rule-005 (pricing data) conditions fired; catalog data current as of 2026-03-24

Trade-off vs. balanced: $4,586 higher unit cost; adds SD-WAN and enterprise-edge throughput over SonicWall's similarly classed appliance — justified if the client anticipates network growth or WAN optimization needs

soft_recommendation: For a 75-user regional branch, the balanced SonicWall option (V012-SEC-0001, $6,570.84) directly addresses the client's stated vendor familiarity and provides enterprise-edge NGFW throughput appropriate for this site size; however, the 341-day data staleness on SonicWall's catalog record is a material concern that must be resolved before quoting. If SonicWall pricing cannot be confirmed in time, the Check Point budget tier (V009-SEC-0002, $666.22) offers a clean, low-risk alternative at the branch-NGFW class. The Palo Alto premium tier (V007-SEC-0002, $11,156.91) is recommended if the client wants a growth-ready platform with SD-WAN and the highest inspection throughput, and it carries no data quality issues. Blended average unit cost across all three tiers is approximately $6,131; blended average margin is approximately 25.2%.
data_freshness_warnings: VEN-012 SonicWall: effective_date 2025-06-05 is 341 days old as of query date (2026-05-12), exceeding the 60-day freshness threshold by 281 days (rule-002). Pricing and availability for V012-SEC-0001 must be reconfirmed with the vendor before customer delivery. SE acknowledgment required.
